action.reasoning: Observation: Training with coverage loss (iterations 8-9) completely failed - 0% exprate, diverging loss. Previous successful run (7.84% in iter 7) used coverage attention but NO coverage loss. Time remaining: ~11.4 min. Analysis: Coverage loss was destabilizing training. Need to retrain without coverage loss, using the proven encoder_dim=256 config. With limited time, train 2-3 epochs with batch_size=16 for speed, then submit eval. Decision: Write clean train.py without coverage loss, reduce predict.py beam_size to 2 for faster eval, train and submit immediately.
